meaning: n.小块,瘤,结节,要点,残端,残根
examples: The nub of his case is that the principles of fairness and due process were breached.
Here we reach the nub of the argument.
That, I think, is the nub of the problem.
The nub, of course, is that the euro is facing a crisis of both.
This is the nub of Cypriots' hard feelings about this week's bank overhaul, whatever its other merits.
